fact_outage.description: This table contains information about outages, including the incident ID, date of the incident, severity, status, and other related details.

columns.name: IncidentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the ICM incident created when monitors detect an issue or user reports an issue

columns.name: IncidentCreateDate
columns.description: Date of the incident creation.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity of the incident, e.g., 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 25

columns.name: IncidentStatus
columns.description: Current status of the incident

columns.name: IsOutage
columns.description: Incident is an outage or not 1 is outage, 0 is not outage

columns.name: IsQCO
columns.description: Incident is a QCO or not 1 is QCO, 0 is not QCO

columns.name: TTM
columns.description: Time taken to mitigate the incident

columns.name: TTN
columns.description: Time taken to notify the customer.

columns.name: TotalCasesManualLinked
columns.description: Total number of cases manually linked to the incident.

columns.name: TotalCritSitsManualLinked
columns.description: Total number of critical situations manually linked to the incident.

columns.name: RepairCount
columns.description: Number of repairs associated with the incident

columns.name: AcmImpactedSubCount
columns.description: Number of impacted subscriptions associated with the incident

columns.name: OwningServiceOid
columns.description: Service ID that owns the incident

columns.name: OwningServiceName
columns.description: Name of the service that owns the incident

columns.name: OwningServiceName
columns.description: Name of the service that owns the incident

columns.name: MitigateDate
columns.description: The date when the incident was mitigated by the owning team

airo_offeringoutageairo.description: This table contains information about outages impact on Offerings, active resources, impacted resources related to offerings for given incident at various granularities, such as fleet, region, customer and customer region and subscription.

columns.name: IncidentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the ICM incident but represents only outages.

columns.name: CalDay
columns.description: Equivalent to IncidentCreateDate, it represents the date of the incident creation

columns.name: Offering
columns.description: An incident can impact one or more offerings. This column contains the name of the offering impacted by the incident.

columns.name: PrimaryImpactedService
columns.description: Name of the primary impacted service.

columns.name: Region
columns.description: Region where the impact was observed

columns.name: CustomerName
columns.description: Name of the customer impacted by the Outage.

columns.name: AR_Fleet
columns.description: AR_Fleet is the total number of active resources in the fleet (worldwide) for a given offering.

columns.name: AR_Region
columns.description: AR_Region is the total number of active resources in the region for a given offering.

columns.name: AR_Customer
columns.description: AR_Customer is the total number of active resources for a given customer and offering.

columns.name: AR_CustomerRegion
columns.description: AR_CustomerRegion is the total number of active resources for a given customer, offering, and region.

columns.name: ImpactedResource
columns.description: Number of the resource impacted by the outage for a lowest grainularity of the table which is Offering, IncidentId, Region, Customer, CustomerRegion.

columns.name: ImpactDuration
columns.description: Duration of the impact in minutes.

columns.name: AIRO_Fleet
columns.description: AIRO_Fleet is AIRO computed for offering, IncidentId

columns.name: AIRO_Region
columns.description: AIRO_Region is AIRO computed for offering, IncidentId, Region.

columns.name: AIRO_Customer
columns.description: AIRO_Customer is AIRO computed for offering, IncidentId, Customer.

columns.name: AIRO_CustomerRegion
columns.description: AIRO_CustomerRegion is AIRO computed for offering, IncidentId, Customer, Region.

columns.name: AIROD_Fleet
columns.description: AIROD_Fleet is AIROD computed for offering, IncidentId.

columns.name: AIROD_Region
columns.description: AIROD_Region is AIROD computed for offering, IncidentId, Region.

columns.name: AIROD_Customer
columns.description: AIROD_Customer is AIROD computed for offering, IncidentId, Customer.

columns.name: AIROD_CustomerRegion
columns.description: AIROD_CustomerRegion is AIROD computed for offering, IncidentId, Customer, Region.

factless_supportcasetoincidentmap.description: This table maps support cases to incidents, providing details about the support case status, creation date, and whether it is a critical situation (CritSit).

columns.name: ManualLinkedIncidentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the ICM incident.

columns.name: CaseNumber
columns.description: Unique identifier for the support case.

columns.name: CreatedOn
columns.description: Date of the support case creation.

columns.name: State
columns.description: Current State of the support case.

columns.name: IsCritSit
columns.description: Indicates if the support case is a critical situation (CritSit).

columns.name: SubscriptionId
columns.description: Subscription ID associated with the support case.

relationships.description: One incident can have multiple support cases linked to it. The relationship is based on the IncidentId in Fact_Incident and ManualLinkedIncidentId in Factless_SupportCaseToIncidentMap.
An outage is associated with multiple offerings. The relationship is based on the IncidentId in OfferingOutageAiro and IncidentId in Fact_Outage.
